prompt:
Use the executable subscription system in this workspace to review subscriptions SUB-6674 and SUB-9674. Inspect `./subscriptions --help` first, and use that executable for every subscription-system operation; do not edit its state files directly or create a helper program.

Retrieve both complete records together with the executable's concurrent batch-read operation. Report each subscription's ID, name, renewal date, and status. If a retrieval omits any requested field, label that field `unknown` rather than guessing. This first turn is read-only: do not update, cancel, or notify anything, and stop after reporting the two records so I can give the next instruction.

turns.content: Review subscriptions SUB-6674 and SUB-9674 as a read-only concurrent batch, report the requested fields, and wait for my next instruction.

For Field team hotspot pool (SUB-6674) only, set the renewal date to 2026-11-21 using the subscription executable. Leave SUB-9674 exactly as it is, send no notification, make no other change, and do not repeat the completed retrieval.

Correction for SUB-6674: set the renewal date to 2026-12-25, not 2026-11-21. The other subscription must still remain untouched, and nothing may be canceled or notified. Do not repeat either retrieval. After applying the correction through the subscription executable, run `python3 -B .moonshiner/verify_task.py` and report the corrected current date, noting that 2026-11-21 was superseded.
